extract: Crabominable (Japanese: ケケンカニ Kekenkani) is a dual-type Fighting/Ice Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It evolves from Crabrawler when leveled up at Mount Lanakila or when exposed to an Ice Stone. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) Crabominable can Mega Evolve into Mega Crabominable using the Crabominite. Mega Crabominable was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
